data.name: HH TRAP~改變常識的陷阱~
data.detailed_description:
▌簡介

「DUNGEON」——這是充滿夢想、希望、浪漫的冒險者所憧憬的地方。

修行中的武術家「舞華」正在挑戰此迷宮。

她挑戰的迷宮中，有許多傳說的武術家們留下的各種珍寶……

舞華在挑戰迷宮時，突然出現了一個與至今為止的迷宮完全不同氛圍的樓層。

這是講述舞華穿越迷宮中的某個陷阱的故事……

▌遊玩方式

▲再小的異變也別漏看了！！

【指引】

1.0的時候不會發生異變。

2.除了0以外的時候，請不要漏看異變。（到最後一刻都不要鬆懈。）

3.如果有異變的話，就回頭。

4.如果沒有異變的話，就別回頭。

5.如果在7之後沒有發生異變的話，就可以脫離這個陷阱。

 

▲如果一直漏看異變的話……

【注意】

1.不要觸碰異變……

2.如果漏看異變的話……

可能你也會變成這個陷阱的一部份也說不定……

 

▌遊戲特徵

・總共有5種結局，淫蕩END有4種。

・本遊戲中的色色情景全部都是動畫。

・預計遊玩時間5～10分鐘。

data.short_description: 挑戰地下城的武鬥家「舞華」，發現自己陷入了不察覺異變就無法逃離的陷阱中。 如果累積太多異變的話，原本正常的認知也會開始扭曲，甚至變成毫無羞恥心的痴女……
data.supported_languages: 日文, 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows® 11
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows® 11
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)

data.name: HH TRAP: Reality's Glitch
data.detailed_description:
▌Story

"DUNGEON"—a realm brimming with dreams, hope, and romance, the ultimate playground for daring adventurers.

The martial artist in training, "Maika", is challenging this dungeon.

The dungeon she braves holds treasures left by legendary martial artists...

As Maika ventures through the dungeon, a floor with an eerie, unfamiliar atmosphere suddenly emerges...

This is Maika's tale of facing a deadly trap in the dungeon...

▌How to Play

▲ Catch every anomaly!

【Guidelines】

1.At 0, no changes occur.

2.Beyond 0, stay sharp—don't miss a single anomaly. (Hold your nerve until the very end.)

3.If you detect an anomaly, turn back immediately.

4.If everything seems normal, press forward without hesitation.

5.After reaching 7 with no anomalies spotted, you're free to break out of the trap.

 

▲ Keep missing anomalies, and...

【Warnings】

1.Never tamper with the anomalies...

2.Overlook them, and...

You might just become part of the trap yourself...

 

▌Game Features

A total of 5 endings, including 4 steamy, erotic BAD ENDS.

All H scenes are fully animated for immersive, heart-pounding excitement.

Playtime: 5–10 thrilling minutes.

data.short_description: Join martial artist ''Maika" as she braves a perilous dungeon, only to fall into cunning trap that twists reality. Miss the subtle anomalies and her sharp mind risks transforming into a shamless seductress, lost forever.
data.supported_languages: Japanese, English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows® 11
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: Windows® 11
  • Processor: 2+ GHz Processor
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
